nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=210 beats='Maren Coll arrives as new keeper of the Salt Archive above Saltmere on the night the low tide comes in wrong and the oldest vaults begin to drink the sea, and four ways to meet the drowning open before her'>>

choices.label: Go out and read the sea.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='Maren turns toward the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults; salt damp beads on the stone and her lantern doubles in the standing water; a first wrongness snags her'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=186 beats='the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults offers Maren two ways in: press hard and risk being noticed by whatever the water answers to, or wait and let the archive keep its secret a while longer'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='pressed directly, the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults yields a hard specific fact that will not sit still in Maren’s mind and points deeper under the tideline'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=181 beats='watching the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults from the edge, Maren can fold the quiet detail into what she knows, or let the cold and the late hour pull her attention away before she has understood it'>>

choices.label: Hold the thread and go on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=169 beats='both readings of the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults settle on the same small impossibility, and Maren feels the flooded floor tilt the whole building toward one question'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='Maren goes down after the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults, the water climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='Maren goes down after the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults, the water climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='Maren goes down after the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults, the water climbing each step to her ankles then her shins, the corridor lantern-lit and swaying, the shared question waiting below'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults shows Maren a name half dissolved in brine; she can carry the reading down toward the founder’s old pivot, or stop to record only the loss in front of her'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='carrying what the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults has told her, Maren reaches the low landing toward the shared question the whole archive seems built around: why the tide takes what it takes'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=156 beats='the pull of the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults closes over Maren before she can hold it; she surfaces later on dry stone, safe but emptied of the thing she almost understood, the water already higher'>>

ending.title: Lost the Thread at The Flooding Vaults

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=159 beats='Maren stays to record only the catalogue of the flooding lowest vaults and the loss it marks; she leaves the deeper question unasked and learns one true small thing about how Saltmere forgets'>>

ending.title: A Note on The Flooding Vaults

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=196 beats='every approach converges here: the tide does not rise blindly but climbs toward particular shelves, taking first the records the town most wanted gone, and Maren finally sees the pattern in the ruin'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=187 beats='the water reads the archive like an index of shame, and Maren understands the flood is a choosing; she must decide how to test the choosing before it reaches the middle vaults'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=182 beats='three threads lead deeper from the choosing tide: the drowned marriage records, the contributor own withheld pages, and the muster rolls the town struck from memory'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=177 beats='Maren wades to the drowned marriage records, where the vows the town later denied lie swelling in their boxes; the ink lifts off the page and rearranges as she watches'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='reading the drowned marriage records line by drowned line, Maren copies the water revisions into her book while the boxes sag and the tide keeps its patient climb'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=170 beats='reading the drowned marriage records line by drowned line, Maren copies the water revisions into her book while the boxes sag and the tide keeps its patient climb'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=183 beats='the drowned marriage records can be read as the water leaves it, changed, or dried and forced back to what it first said; each choice costs Maren something of the truth'>>

choices.label: Dry it and force it back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=175 beats='the revision of the drowned marriage records proves more honest than the original, and the discovery pulls Maren toward the second pivot'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='the drowned marriage records names a thing the archive was never meant to shelve; Maren can carry the contradiction toward what the building truly holds, or seal this vault and save only itself'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='with the drowned marriage records rewritten in her hands, Maren climbs toward the second question under all the others: what was the Salt Archive actually built to hold'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=157 beats='Maren dries the drowned marriage records and forces the ink back to its first lie; the page holds, but she has helped Saltmere forget again, and the water only climbs faster'>>

ending.title: Forced Back: The Vows the Town Forgot

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=160 beats='Maren seals the vault around the drowned marriage records and saves the room if not the meaning; she keeps a true thing safe and leaves its harder truth unspoken'>>

ending.title: Sealed Around the Vows the Town Kept

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=200 beats='the three threads reconverge and answer together: the Salt Archive was never built to keep the town records but to hold everything Saltmere chose to forget, a covenant with its own unremembering, and the sea has come to call the covenant in'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=188 beats='Elias Verrin did not build a library, Maren realises, but a lung for the town shame, breathing what could not be said; the tide is the town’s own held breath let go at last'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='two ways remain to test the covenant before it drowns: the founder own confession folded into the ledger, and the living voice of the last woman who fed the archive its secrets'>>

choices.label: Read what the sea writes back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='Maren comes to the founder folded confession; what Elias Verrin could not undo waits like held weather, and the salt light off the water makes the room feel underwater already'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='Maren trades honesty for honesty with the founder folded confession, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of what Elias Verrin could not undo, the water rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='Maren trades honesty for honesty with the founder folded confession, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of what Elias Verrin could not undo, the water rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='Maren trades honesty for honesty with the founder folded confession, and each thing she admits about herself unlocks another turn of what Elias Verrin could not undo, the water rising past the sill as they speak'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=182 beats='the founder folded confession will answer Maren honestly only if she gives something true in return; she can offer her own doubt, or keep her distance and take only what is freely shown'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='in exchange, the founder folded confession gives Maren the last turn of the story, and it points at a document with her own name where no name of hers should be'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=177 beats='the founder folded confession sets the impossible page before Maren; she can carry it to the third pivot and face it, or refuse the page and keep the version of herself she arrived with'>>

choices.label: Carry the page to the pivot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=171 beats='with what the founder folded confession has given her, Maren climbs to the last turn, where the archive stops being about Saltmere and becomes about the keeper who came to save it'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='Maren keeps her distance from the founder folded confession and takes only what is safe to take; she leaves with facts and without the truth, dry and unchanged and a little ashamed'>>

ending.title: Kept Distance: What Elias Verrin Left Unsaid

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=161 beats='Maren refuses the page the founder folded confession offers and stays the woman she was; she preserves her own settled story and never learns what the archive wrote in her name'>>

ending.title: Refused the Page Elias Verrin Left

nodes.body: <<FILL role=revelation words=202 beats='both final threads meet on one impossible sheet: Maren Coll’s own name, in her own hand, signing an entry dated before she was ever hired, as though the archive had been waiting for a keeper it already knew'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=189 beats='the entry records a promise: that the last keeper would decide what Saltmere is allowed to remember, and Maren sees the flood has only ever been asking her to choose'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=185 beats='she reads her own signed words to their end while the water laps the top step, and the whole town memory now waits on what she does before dawn'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=192 beats='four ways to answer the drowning archive lie open, and each keeps a different thing: the town made whole, one saved treasure, peace with what cannot be kept, or the honest small salvage of a losing night'>>

choices.label: Reconcile the town with what it forgot.
Salvage what you can and let the rest go.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='Maren commits to reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget and starts down into the flooding stair, the water black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned archive'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='Maren commits to reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget and starts down into the flooding stair, the water black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned archive'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='Maren commits to reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget and starts down into the flooding stair, the water black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned archive'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='Maren commits to reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget and starts down into the flooding stair, the water black and rising, her lantern the only warm thing left in the drowned archive'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=181 beats='Maren sets herself to reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget; the choice settles in her chest like ballast, and the flooded archive seems to lean in to watch how she will keep it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=184 beats='reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget can be done gently, saving the fragile first, or decisively, taking the whole weight at once while the water still climbs'>>

choices.label: Take the whole weight at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=178 beats='working gently at reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget, Maren reaches a fork: trust Nan Ostler to carry half the burden, or bear it alone and spare the old woman the cost'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=179 beats='taking the whole weight of reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget, Maren must choose fast: follow the founder method to the letter, or break from Elias Verrin and do it her own way'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='the two ways of reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget rejoin on the narrow stair, water at her knees, one lantern left, and Maren works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='the two ways of reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget rejoin on the narrow stair, water at her knees, one lantern left, and Maren works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=173 beats='the two ways of reconciling Saltmere with what it chose to forget rejoin on the narrow stair, water at her knees, one lantern left, and Maren works upward through the cold toward the last of the choosing'>>
